retrieved_result: How to Pair Your Bluetooth Phone With a 2006 2009 Bmw 3 Series 1 Place the Comfort Access remote control into the slot on the dashboard, but DO NOT press the Start/Stop button.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Bluetooth pairing for a BMW, which is unrelated to IDEs or software development topics.
